UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Cups card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Cups card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Cups card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Cups card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Cups card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Cups card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the innocence and radiant joy of Heidi's childhood in the Alps, the simple beauty of the courtyard and edelweiss flowers.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing any potential challenges or hardships, focus on the warm and innocent feelings this card evokes.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Cups card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, warm, nostalgic, hopeful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Cups card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Six of Cups card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Peter Pan's refusal to grow, the shadow of the crocodile, and the acorn hat as symbols of stagnation and a longing for the past.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the mischievous aspect of Peter Pan, focusing instead on his melancholic yearning for Neverland.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Cups card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, reverb, minor, introspective, instrumental

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the balance between Dorothy's homesickness and her wondrous discovery of new growth.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the physical details, instead focus on the emotional journey represented by this card.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Six of Cups card in an between position.
